title: asplenium bantamense
intro: Asplenium bantamense, also known as the Bantam Lady Fern, is a species of fern in the family Aspleniaceae. This plant is primarily used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Southeast Asian medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Asplenium bantamense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Asplenium bantamense typically involve drying the plant's fronds and leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal use.
